facility_id: # NSF awardee + filter overrides for cod-kmap facilities.
# Each row narrows the NSF Awards API search for one facility.
# Multiple rows per facility are aggregated:
#   awardee_name  — exact NSF awardeeName (one row per awardee to query)
#                   ANY-match: an award is kept if it matches at least one row.
#   title_match   — case-insensitive substring of award title (ANY-match).
#   award_id      — exact NSF award id whitelist (skips API search).
# A row may set ONLY awardee_name (pulls all that awardee's NSF awards)
# OR awardee_name + program_match (filters to a program family)
# OR award_id (pins a specific known award).
# === LTER sites — coastal-relevant subset of US LTER Network ===
# Each LTER's NSF awardee is the host university; the award is identified
# by the LTER program name. NSF program for LTERs is

awardee_name: LONG TERM ECOLOGICAL RESEARCH" or sometimes
University of California-San Diego Scripps Inst of Oceanography
University of California-San Diego Scripps Inst of Oceanography
University of Georgia Research Foundation Inc
University of Georgia Research Foundation Inc

awardee_name: University of Texas Marine Science Institute
University of Texas Marine Science Institute
